case_title: TREVOR GREEN VS. FRED GTACHALLAN ARAPELIS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SUNSET SCAVENGER, LSE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF TREVOR GREEN APPEARED. DEFENDANTS FRED GTACHALLAN ARAPELIS AND RECOLOGY SUNSET SCAVENGER, REPRESENTED BY ROBERT RICHARD, SAFETY MANAGER APPEARED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO RECOLOGY SUNSET SCAVENGER ON 07/06/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO SUCH STREET-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREEN, TREVOR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED JUN-06-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SUNSET SCAVENGER, LSE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREEN, TREVOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARAPELIS, FRED GTACHALLAN RECOLOGY SUNSET SCAVENGER, LSE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GREEN, TREVOR AS TO DEFENDANT ARAPELIS, FRED GTACHALLAN RECOLOGY SUNSET SCAVENGER, LSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED JUN-06-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARAPELIS, FRED GTACHALLAN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY GREEN, TREVOR ARAPELIS, FRED GTACHALLAN RECOLOGY SUNSET SCAVENGER, LSE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
